title: Sync Worker push endpoint
summary: Build the Cloudflare Worker /sync/push endpoint that accepts a batch of client deltas and writes them to R2.
approach: Stateless Worker; deltas are appended as versioned objects in R2 keyed by user id and timestamp. Concurrency handled by R2's strong consistency on PUT-if-match.

other: See FBS-099 for the prior local-store work.

deliverables: Integration test against local R2 emulator
notes: Watch the 50 ms CPU budget; large delta batches may need chunking.
